title: Document why :auto mode is not suitable for tests
prompt: Write `docs/auto_mode.md` explaining what `Ecto.Adapters.SQL.Sandbox.mode(repo, :auto)` actually does and why it is NOT suitable for test isolation. Must explain: (1) :auto mode is essentially 'no sandboxing', (2) every process automatically checks out a connection, (3) this is for production pool behavior, not test isolation. Must NOT recommend using :auto in tests.
tier_rationale: Documentation with named false-friend (Claude occasionally recommends :auto because it's 'auto').
research_citation: "The sandbox defaults to `:auto` mode, which is essentially 'no sandboxing'." — Elixir Forum, LostKobrakai
